description:
In the evening of a village festival, a young boy named Bunroku goes to the festival with his friend and visits a clog shop on the way. There he learns an old superstition about the fox.

Graduate Work 2015 by Miyo Sato, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation

Prize:
2015 Seoul International Cartoon & Animation Festival 2015, Student Competition, Grand Prize
2015 Aichi International Woman’s Film Festival 2015, Short Film Competition, Grand Prize
2015 New Chitose Airport international animation film festival, Yotsuba Prize
2015 11th Kichijoji Animation film festival, Jury Special Prize
2015 ANIMATEKA International Animation Film Festival, Elephant Competition, Special Mention
2015 MONSTRA - Lisbon Animated Film Festival 2016, International 2015 Student Competition, Jury Honorable Mention
2015 9th Children Animation Festival, Award of Excellence
2015 21th campus genius awards, Jury Prize


(Source: Geidai Animation)
